name: gtm-ontology-builder
description: Build an agent-ready business ontology for GTM systems, including CRM objects, pipelines, automations, agent actions, and KPIs.

interface.shortDescription: Build agent-ready ontologies for CRM and GTM systems.
interface.longDescription: Model CRM objects, business semantics, pipelines, automations, agent actions, governance policies, and KPIs as a validated GTM ontology.
defaultPrompt: Build a GTM ontology for my CRM stack.
Map my sales process for AI agents.
Document my CRM objects, fields, and automations.
